creator: bzeeb+freebsdports@zabbadoz.net
text:
As just announced on the hercules list

--- cite ---
The conmicro.cx domain will expire on December 3, 2007, and will not be
renewed.

Please make sure you're using hercules-390.org for all of your Hercules
needs. ...
--- /cite ---

Yes, there are no mirror sites and should not be (the freebsd.org
distfiles mirroring is ok though).

Fix: bz@foo:~/hercules> cvs -qR diff -up Makefile


MAINTAINER=    bzeeb+freebsdports@zabbadoz.net
 COMMENT=       The Hercules System/370, ESA/390, and z/Architecture Emulator--Nf8XvxE6BXMwOJtdlq89lwXMAiUwWoIXyXlpqIc7FeVuedOb
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /shared/mirror/FreeBSD/r/pcvs/ports/emulators/hercules/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.22
diff -u -p -r1.22 Makefile
--- Makefile    4 Oct 2007 00:47:21 -0000       1.22
+++ Makefile    26 Nov 2007 19:50:55 -0000
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ PORTNAME=       hercules
 PORTVERSION=   3.04
 PORTREVISION=  1
 CATEGORIES=    emulators
-MASTER_SITES=  http://www.conmicro.cx/hercules/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://www.hercules-390.org/
